__comment: Per-target short `description` fields for channels whose description is embedded in a BUILD ARTIFACT (stamped by stamp-descriptions.mjs) or passed to a generator (homebrew -> publish-brew -> bump-brew). The canonical vision one-liner lives in the toolchain fragment frontmatter (docs/fragments/global.md); use the literal "@global" to inherit it, anything else is a deliberate channel-specific override. NOT here: .claude-plugin/marketplace.json, which Claude reads from git (not a build artifact) — its description is committed/hand-maintained. See documentation_propagation.md.
vscode: Design, visualize, and implement entire Temporal systems in `.twf` — namespaces, workers, workflows, and Nexus — with a deterministic language server and an interactive architecture visualizer. Covers activities, child workflows, signals, queries, updates, timers, promises, and Nexus.
npm-twf: Toolchain for designing and validating entire Temporal systems in `.twf` — CLI, language server, and MCP server.
pypi: Toolchain for designing and validating entire Temporal systems in .twf — CLI, language server, and MCP server.
claude-plugin: Claude Code plugin payload for temporal-architect — the `.twf` architecture toolchain for designing, validating, and implementing entire Temporal systems (design, Go-authoring, and infra-provisioning skills, plus the twf MCP server).
homebrew: Toolchain for designing and validating entire Temporal systems in .twf
